_comment: Known NZA coding errors by dataset filename. Entries are automatically ignored when a new dataset file is used — no manual cleanup needed on dataset update. Add entries only after manually verifying the town bylaw.

2502357600.reason: AR district coded f4=allowed; Ch.20.40 Permitted Uses lists only single-family dwelling — multifamily not mentioned. NZA misread affirmative enumeration bylaw structure.

2501703005.reason: A1+A2 districts coded f4=allowed; Sec.5.2 Table of Use Regulations shows SPB (special permit from Planning Board) for multifamily in A1 and A2. Only GR district correctly allows multifamily by right.
